id.description: Dot-separated identifier matching the Python QCCheck.name attribute, e.g. temporal.time_monotonicity

name.description: Short human-readable name shown in the dashboard

kind.description: Framework layer for this check definition

categories.description: High-level groupings shown in the dashboard; a check may belong to multiple categories

scope.description: global = all variables and all experiments; per_variable = variable-wide across experiments; per_experiment = meaningful for specific experiments. Checks may combine per_variable and per_experiment.

severity.description: Default outcome level if the check does not pass

status.description: Lifecycle state of this check definition

description.description: Full explanation of what the check verifies and why

proposed_by.description: GitHub handle of the proposer, e.g. @rbeucher

issue.description: GitHub Issue number where this check was proposed/discussed

implemented_in.description: Fully qualified Python class name, e.g. access_moppy.qc.checks.temporal.TimeMonotonicityCheck
